function.message: I can’t safely complete this yet because I can’t map the request to two canonical project records in `40_projects/` to compare start dates and choose a deletion target. Please provide the exact project folder names (or paths) for “tax firm sprint” and “sailboat refit notebook.”
function.rulebook_notes: Followed process-next-inbox-item workflow, treated inbox as non-canonical, cross-checked against canonical project lane, and applied deletion workflow requirement to stop when evidence does not uniquely support deleting a file.
function.outcome_justification: The request requires deleting one project, but canonical identification is incomplete: direct name searches for both requested projects in `40_projects` did not yield a resolvable pair of project records. Deletion-and-wiping rules require exact target confirmation and prohibit guessing.
